Pride and Glory (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $15,740,721Details
International Box Office $16,522,145
Worldwide Box Office $32,262,866
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,434,435
Total $12,434,435
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,262,396 (39.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,585 opening theaters/2,585 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $26,219,920

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 24th, 2008 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: January 27th, 2009 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, pervasive language and brief drug content.
Running Time: 125 minutes
Plot point: Corrupt Cops, Crime, Drug Dealer, Dysfunctional Family, Father’s Footsteps, Framed, Police Brutality
Social setting: Police life
Subgenre: Crime Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Solaris Entertainment, O’Connor Brothers
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
